name: Clara Pipeline B - Onboarding to v2

parameters.value: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', max_tokens: 2000, system: 'Extract configuration updates from onboarding call transcript. Return ONLY valid JSON with same schema as account memo. Only include fields explicitly confirmed. Do not hallucinate. Use null for anything not mentioned.', messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $json.transcript }] }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, account_id: $json.v2_memo.account_id, version: 'v2', changes_count: $json.changelog.changes.length }) }}

meta.description: Clara Pipeline B: Onboarding Input -> v2 Account Memo + Agent Spec + Changelog
